revision.comment: Bot: mark 1 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24644718927|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:瓢箪山古墳]]
'''Hyōtan-yama Kofun''' (瓢箪山古墳) or '''Hisago-yama Kofun''' (瓢箪山古墳) is a name commonly used for [[kofun]] (ancient Kofuns) across Japan. The name originates from the resemblance of {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} (keyhole-shaped Kofuns) to a {{ill|Gourd|en|Gourd|qid=Q5339237|lt=gourd|1=Gourd}} (瓢箪, hyōtan or hisago).
* {{ill|Komayoka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|駒岡瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Komayoka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|1=Komaoka Hyōtan-yama Kofun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q119217988}} - A kofun in {{ill|Tsurumi-ku, Yokohama|en|Tsurumi-ku, Yokohama|qid=Q1202820|lt=Tsurumi Ward, Yokohama|1=Tsurumi-ku, Yokohama}}, {{ill|Yokohama|en|Yokohama|qid=Q38283|lt=Yokohama|1=Yokohama}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami)|ja|瓢箪山古墳 (函南町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami)|1=Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Kannami Town)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q117337757}} - A kofun in {{ill|Kannami|en|Kannami|qid=Q1203533|lt=Kannami|1=Kannami}}, {{ill|Tagata District, Shizuoka|en|Tagata District, Shizuoka|qid=Q1154841|lt=Tagata District, Shizuoka|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Moriyama Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja|守山瓢箪山古墳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriyama Hyōtan-yama Kofun|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135579120}} - A kofun in {{ill|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|en|Moriyama-ku, Nagoya|qid=Q1155291|lt=Moriyama Ward, Nagoya|1=Moriyama-ku, Nagoya}}, {{ill|Nagoya|en|Nagoya|qid=Q11751|lt=Nagoya|1=Nagoya}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|qid=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Azuchi-Hyōtanyama Kofun|en|Azuchi-Hyōtanyama Kofun|qid=Q11450459|lt=Azuchi Hyōtan-yama Kofun|1=Azuchi-Hyōtanyama Kofun}} - A kofun in {{ill|Azuchi|ja|安土町地域自治区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azuchi|1=Azuchi-cho Regional Autonomous District|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11450461}}, {{ill|Ōmihachiman|en|Ōmihachiman|qid=Q385461|lt=Ōmihachiman|1=Ōmihachiman}}, {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|qid=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. * Hyōtan-yama Kofun (Higashiōsaka) - A kofun in {{ill|Higashiōsaka|en|Higashiōsaka|qid=Q243863|lt=Higashiōsaka|1=Higashiōsaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}, located at {{ill|Hyōtan-yama Inari Shrine|ja|瓢箪山稲荷神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōtan-yama Inari Shrine|qq=}}. Part of the {{ill|Yamahata Kofun Group|ja|山畑古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamahata Kofun Group|qq=}}, designated as Mound No. 52. * {{ill|Saki Hyōtanyama Kofun|en|Saki Hyōtanyama Kofun|qid=Q11383488|lt=Saki Hyōtan-yama Kofun|1=Saki Hyōtanyama Kofun}} - A kofun in {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|qid=Q169134|lt=Nara|1=Nara (city)}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|qid=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}, part of the {{ill|Saki Tatenami Kofun Group|ja|佐紀盾列古墳群|1=Saki Tatenami Kofun group|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saki Tatenami Kofun Group|13=User:Immanuelle/Saki Tatenami Kofun group|qq=}}.
== See Also == * [[Hyōtan-zuka Kofun|Hyōtan-tsuka Kofun]] * [[Hisagotuka Kofun|Hyō-zuka Kofun]]
